svg.text: free NOAA data · Temporal-orchestrated Python pipeline · static tile serving · Expo app — the hot radar path is drawn in terracotta
MRMS 2 m · nowcast 2 m · alerts 5 m · HRRR 15 m · cleanup 1 h
OverlapPolicy.SKIP — a slow run drops newer triggers
GRIB2 → grid → 3 palettes × z4–8 PNG tiles
retention sweeps · GFS/HRRR sync (own worker pool)
PINNED worker versioning · heartbeats · graceful drain
tiles render into a .tmp dir, then os.rename into place —
the manifest never advertises a half-written frame.
nowcast swaps its whole manifest layer per run
Hot path (terracotta): NOAA MRMS → ingest → tiles PVC → tile-server → edge → phone, under 3 minutes from scan to screen. Full walkthrough: ARCHITECTURE.md
